nasb.text: Thus says the king, ‘Do not let Hezekiah deceive you, for he will not be able to deliver you from my hand;

esv.text: Thus says the king: ‘Do not let Hezekiah deceive you, for he will not be able to deliver you out of my hand.

cnv.text: 王這樣說：‘不要給希西家欺騙了你們，因為他不能從我的手中解救你們；

ccb.text: 王说，‘你们不要被希西迦欺骗，他不能从我手中救你们。
